name: 3DShopping.com
summary: 3DShopping.com doing business as O2 Essential Marketing Technologies, offers online services, including 3-dimensional Website creation and hosting. 3DShopping.com was formerly known as Pi Graphix, Inc. and it changed its name to 3DShopping.com in 1999. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Marina del Rey, California.
